title: Scott Thorson (Total Performance Sports Medicine)
html:
Scott Thorson — owner/operator of Total Performance Sports Medicine (totalperformance.clinic). One of Rankett's two free-work proof-of-concept clients per the April 2026 Rankett build doc — Yahir's team has SEO Manager admin access to the WordPress site.

What we know

  • Business: Total Performance Sports Medicine — sports medicine clinic.
  • URL: totalperformance.clinic
  • Rankett role: free-work tier-1 client. Provides Yahir's team with WP-admin access for the AI-search optimization work — used to build testimonials/case studies before partner program launches at scale.
  • Used for: full simulation of a real client tier-1 implementation per the Rankett April 2026 build doc.

Related summaries

  • 2026 04 27 rankett com build doc
  • rankett
  • caspian — the other free-work client

related.label: Rankett.com build doc — partner program launch + landing page rewrite + pricing tiers
